title: More than a meal — a complete dining experience.
subtitle: From breakfast dosas to evening desserts, dine-in to drive-through — we serve you the way you prefer.

items.title: Dine-In Experience
items.description: Spacious first floor restaurant with warm lighting, tasteful décor, and a cozy yet refined ambiance.

items.title: Drive-Through
items.description: In a hurry? Use our drive-through service for quick bites, snacks, and takeaway packages.

items.title: Delivery & Takeaway
items.description: No-contact delivery and takeaway available. Get your favorite dishes delivered to your doorstep.

items.title: Catering & Events
items.description: We cater for events, parties, and celebrations. Private dining room available for special occasions.
